description: Research the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) to identify the legal requirements for conducting a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA).
Extract key articles from the GDPR that specifically mention DPIA requirements.
Summarize the findings regarding the legal obligations for organizations when conducting a DPIA under the GDPR.
Look for guidance documents or resources from data protection authorities that elaborate on DPIA requirements.
Compile all findings into a structured report detailing the legal requirements for conducting a DPIA under the GDPR.
